---
title: "Selected Publications & Talks"
toc: true
toc-location: right
toc-depth: 3
---



## In preparation

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.** & Pavel Iosad. Autosegmental locality derives from the
  contrastive hierarchy: Evidence from micro-variation in Bantu vowel harmony.
  Target journal: *Natural Language & Linguistic Theory*.

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.** Quantifying individual differences in ERP responses:
  A flexible GAM-based pipeline for heterogeneous response profiles.

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.** Modeling and predicting language change in apparent
  time: A two-part methodology using GAMMs and GLMMs.

## Under review

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Mizuki Tanigawa & Hjalmar Eiksund.
  Where does multilectalism end and multilingualism begin? Multilectals show
  variety-conditioned morphosyntactic processing in Norwegian self-paced reading.
  *Bilingualism: Language and Cognition*.
  [[Preprint]](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1dKIPXKUnJhDQ4j71lwsqi6QhGeHeACXv/view)

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Anna Kamenetski & Merete Anderssen.
  The parser tracks grammatical probability: Gradient acceptability and
  morphosyntactic transparency modulate P600 magnitude and latency.
  *Brain and Language*.
  [[Preprint]](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1v0AYFofU3OLRuYCpRW3uDbR0RwwUzv3P/view)

- Helset, Stig, **Jade J. Sandstedt** & Tor Arne Haugen.
  Om to innsamlingsmetodar for talemålsdata: Korrelasjon og avvik mellom
  kontrollert stimulibasert elisitering og eigenrapportert språkbruk i
  spørjeskjema. *Norsk Lingvistisk Tidsskrift*.

## Published

### 2026

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Maki Kubota, Merete Anderssen, Stig Helset, Björn
  Lundquist, Øystein A. Vangsnes & Jason Rothman.
  Neurolinguistic signatures of microvariation and language change:
  Individual production variability predicts morphosyntactic processing
  differences. *Cognition* 272, 106477.
  [[doi]](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cognition.2026.106477)

### 2025

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Maki Kubota, Merete Anderssen, Jeannique Ann Darby,
  Stig Helset, Elahe Tavakoli, Øystein A. Vangsnes & Jason Rothman.
  Bidialectal language representation and processing: Evidence from Norwegian
  ERPs. *Journal of Memory and Language* 140, 104557.
  [[doi]](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jml.2024.104557)

- Anderson, Cormac, Matthew Scarborough, Lechosław Jocz, … **Jade J. Sandstedt**, et al.
  The Indo-European Cognate Relationships dataset.
  *Scientific Data* 12, 1541. [[doi]](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-025-05445-3)

### 2024

- Kubota, Maki, Jorge González Alonso, Merete Anderssen, Isabel Nadine Jensen,
  Alicia Luque, Sergio Pereira Soares, Yanina Prystauka, Øystein A. Vangsnes,
  **Jade J. Sandstedt** & Jason Rothman.
  Bidialectal exposure modulates neural signatures to conflicting grammatical
  properties: Norway as a natural laboratory. *Language Learning* 74(2), 436–467.
  [[doi]](https://doi.org/10.1111/lang.12608)

### 2023

- Kjesrud, Karoline, Luka Natassja Olsen, Irene Teixidor-Toneu,
  **Jade J. Sandstedt**, Anneleen Kool & Linda Christiansen.
  Plant remains as sources to cultural history in Southeast Norway.
  In *Complexity and Dynamics: Settlement and Landscape from the Bronze Age
  to the Renaissance in the Nordic Countries (1700 BC–AD 1600)*, pp. 113–128.
  Sidestone Press.

### 2022

- Lyskawa, Paulina, **Jade J. Sandstedt**, Eline Visser, Nathan Young &
  Björn Lundquist.
  Successes and shortcomings of phonological accounts of Scandinavian
  object shift. *Proceedings of the Linguistic Society of America*.

### 2021

- Kool, Anneleen, Karoline Kjesrud, Irene Teixidor-Toneu &
  **Jade J. Sandstedt**.
  Mennesker og planter i fortid og fremtid. In *Planter og tradisjon*.
  Kolofon Forlag. ISBN 9788230021743.

- Teixidor-Toneu, Irene, Anneleen Kool, Simon J. Greenhill, Karoline Kjesrud,
  **Jade J. Sandstedt**, Vincent Manzanilla & Fiona M. Jordan.
  Historical, archaeological and linguistic evidence test the phylogenetic
  inference of Viking-Age plant use. *Philosophical Transactions of the
  Royal Society B* 376, 20200086.
  [[doi]](https://doi.org/10.1098/rstb.2020.0086)

### 2020

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**
  A reanalysis of abstract contrasts and opacity in Bondu-so tongue root
  harmony. *Glossa* 5(1), 91. [[doi]](https://doi.org/10.5334/gjgl.1126)

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**
  Vowel harmony decay in Old Norwegian. *Papers in Historical Phonology* 5,
  11–48. [[doi]](https://doi.org/10.2218/pihph.5.2020.4417)

### 2017

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**
  Transparency and blocking in Old Norwegian height harmony.
  *Transactions of the Philological Society* 115(3), 395–417.
  [[doi]](https://doi.org/10.1111/1467-968X.12113)
  *Winner of the RH Robins Prize, The Philological Society.*

## Thesis

### 2019

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.** *Feature specifications and contrast in vowel harmony:
  The orthography and phonology of Old Norwegian height harmony.* PhD thesis,
  University of Edinburgh.
  [[Online]](https://era.ed.ac.uk/bitstream/handle/1842/35865/Sandstedt2019.pdf)

# Talks

## Invited talks

### 2025

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Hjalmar Eiksund & Mizuki Tanigawa.
  *The psycholinguistics of Nynorsk–Bokmål multilectal reading.*
  LingLunch, University of Bergen.

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**
  *Multilectal influence on reading: Language, brain and learning.*
  Joint talk, Lancaster Multilingualism and Cognition Group / HL2C and
  UiT C-LaBL, Lancaster University / UiT.

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Hjalmar Eiksund & Mizuki Tanigawa.
  *Multilectalism as multilingualism: Processing grammatical variation across
  Nynorsk and Bokmål written standards.* FLUENT Lunch Talk,
  University of Stavanger.

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**
  *Event-related potentials reveal inter- and intra-speaker sociolinguistic
  variability during real-time sentence processing.*
  University of Minho, Braga, Portugal.
  [[slides]](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1nAC6h5IIUv3Bt9hI1mASDnqvNwfSKPiN/view)

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**
  *Bilectalism as a sub-case of bilingualism: Neurocognitive insights from
  Norwegian dialects.* Centre for Research on Bilingualism,
  Stockholm University.

### 2024

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**
  *The impact of sociolinguistic variation on language processing: Tracing
  individual differences in on-going language change in ERPs.*
  Language Research Seminar, MultiLing, University of Oslo.

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.** & Maki Kubota.
  *Exploring bilectalism: How different Norwegian dialects shape language
  processing and representation.* LingLunch, University of Bergen.

## Conference talks & posters

### 2025

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Maki Kubota, Merete Anderssen, Jeannique Ann Darby,
  Stig Helset, Björn Lundquist, Elahe Tavakoli, Øystein A. Vangsnes &
  Jason Rothman.
  Dialect and sociolinguistic influence on reading: Evidence from Norwegian
  ERPs. *ISB 15 — 15th International Symposium on Bilingualism*, BCBL,
  San Sebastián, Spain.
  [[slides]](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OZhK5VPuhkst7tP9Kkge_TalDBwlZe62/view)

- Bye, Patrik & **Jade J. Sandstedt**.
  West Nordic umlaut, Old Norwegian vowel harmony, and the life cycle.
  *Fonologi i Norden*, University of Oslo.
  [[handout]](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1FnY_MIgKStHkM9SEdl2X-z_AyeArn6Ql/view)

### 2024

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Maki Kubota, Merete Anderssen, Jeannique Ann Darby,
  Stig Helset, Yanina Prystauka, Elahe Tavakoli, Øystein A. Vangsnes &
  Jason Rothman.
  Bidialectal language representation and processing: Evidence from Norwegian
  ERPs. *ICLaVE 12 — 12th International Conference on Language Variation in
  Europe*, Austrian Academy of Sciences / University of Vienna.
  [[handout]](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Zl55NAJV2yiwhnB4D3spNKN9Ehcog3Tl/view)

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Merete Anderssen, Stig Helset, Maki Kubota,
  Björn Lundquist, Øystein A. Vangsnes & Jason Rothman.
  Tracing language change in ERPs. *AMLaP — Architectures and Mechanisms of
  Language Processing*, University of Edinburgh. *(Poster.)*
  [[poster]](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1YB4vt3TYdIis0Tb6TX_6DM-KJiibLJ8S/view)

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Maki Kubota, Merete Anderssen, Björn Lundquist,
  Jason Rothman & Øystein A. Vangsnes.
  The neurophysiological correlates of language change: Insights from
  on-going dialect levelling in Sunnmøre Norwegian.
  *9th Conference of the Scandinavian Association for Language and Cognition*,
  Norwegian University of Science and Technology, Trondheim.
  [[handout]](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zfoqeOL8w71-tnVcJqZ3FOybB3qmMnwj/view)

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Maki Kubota, Merete Anderssen, Stig Helset,
  Jason Rothman & Øystein A. Vangsnes.
  The neurophysiological correlates of language change: Insights from
  on-going dialect levelling in Sunnmøre Norwegian.
  Center for Language, Brain and Learning (C-LaBL),
  UiT — The Arctic University of Norway, Tromsø.
  [[handout]](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ES_qfKnLhYLYv2lkTbCuMsRzPL6Ec_Sh/view)

### 2023

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Maki Kubota, Merete Anderssen, Jeannique Ann Darby,
  Stig Helset, Yanina Prystauka, Elahe Tavakoli, Øystein A. Vangsnes &
  Jason Rothman.
  Cross-dialectal influence in bilectal processing: Evidence from Norwegian
  ERPs. *AMLaP — Architectures and Mechanisms of Language Processing*,
  BCBL, San Sebastián, Spain.
  [[handout]](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1VCqfM7Q8iWFJPGKrwe6-_R_VVCOt81a1/view)

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Maki Kubota, Merete Anderssen, Jeannique Ann Darby,
  Stig Helset, Yanina Prystauka, Elahe Tavakoli, Øystein A. Vangsnes &
  Jason Rothman.
  The distinct grammars of bilectal processing: Evidence from Norwegian ERPs.
  *International Conference on Multilingualism and Language Acquisition*,
  University of Helsinki.

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Maki Kubota, Merete Anderssen, Jeannique Ann Darby,
  Stig Helset, Yanina Prystauka, Elahe Tavakoli, Øystein A. Vangsnes &
  Jason Rothman.
  The role of grammatical alignment, engagement, and exposure in
  cross-dialectal influence on bilectal processing.
  *Workshop on Multilectal Minds*,
  UiT — The Arctic University of Norway, Tromsø.

### 2022

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**, Maki Kubota, Merete Anderssen, Anna Bogoyavlenskaya,
  Jeannique Ann Darby, Hjalmar T. Eiksund, Stig Helset, Yanina Prystauka,
  Elahe Tavakoli, Øystein A. Vangsnes & Jason Rothman.
  Tverrdialektal påverknad på bilektal prosessering: bevis frå norske ERPar.
  *Møte om Norsk Språk (MONS)*,
  UiT — The Arctic University of Norway, Tromsø.

### 2021

- **Sandstedt, Jade J.**
  Tracking and visualising the causes and pathways of vowel harmony decay
  in Old Norwegian.
  *12th International Conference of Nordic and General Linguistics*,
  University of Oslo.
  [[handout]](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1WFl3ZZneKE6N1z_1xOBsp71HhF12T9KO/view)
